ddls:
CREATE TABLE "restaurants" (
  "restaurant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each restaurant */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the restaurant */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the restaurant */,
  "price_classification" TEXT /* Price classification of the restaurant (e.g., low-price, mid-price, high-price) */,
  "rating" TEXT /* Average rating of the restaurant based on customer reviews */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the restaurant */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website URL of the restaurant */,
  "latitude" TEXT /* Latitude of the restaurant */,
  "longitude" TEXT /* Longitude of the restaurant */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* Image URL of the restaurant */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the restaurant */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the restaurant was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the restaurant was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("restaurant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cuisines" (
  "cuisine_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cuisine */,
  "cuisine_name" TEXT /* Name of the cuisine (e.g., North, Indian, Chinese) */,
  "cuisine_description" TEXT /* Description of the cuisine */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* Image URL of the cuisine */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cuisine_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "restaurant_cuisines" (
  "restaurant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the restaurant */,
  "cuisine_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cuisine */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("restaurant_id", "cuisine_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "menus" (
  "menu_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each menu item */,
  "restaurant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the restaurant offering the menu item */,
  "menu_name" TEXT /* Name of the menu item */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price of the menu item */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the menu item */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the menu item (e.g., appetizer, main course, dessert) */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* Image URL of the menu item */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the menu item was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the menu item was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("menu_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_menus_restaurant_id FOREIGN KEY ("restaurant_id") REFERENCES restaurants ("restaurant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer placing the order */,
  "restaurant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the restaurant receiving the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "total_cost" TEXT /* Total cost of the order */,
  "order_status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., pending, in progress, delivered) */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used for the order */,
  "delivery_address" TEXT /* Delivery address for the order */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the order was placed */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the order was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_restaurant_id FOREIGN KEY ("restaurant_id") REFERENCES restaurants ("restaurant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer posting the review */,
  "restaurant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the restaurant being reviewed */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was posted */,
  "rating" TEXT /* Rating given by the customer (1-5) */,
  "review_title" TEXT /* Title of the review */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_restaurant_id FOREIGN KEY ("restaurant_id") REFERENCES restaurants ("restaurant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the customer's account */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the customer was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the customer was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "loyalty_programs" (
  "loyalty_program_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each loyalty program */,
  "restaurant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the restaurant offering the loyalty program */,
  "program_name" TEXT /* Name of the loyalty program */,
  "program_description" TEXT /* Description of the loyalty program */,
  "points_per_dollar" TEXT /* Points earned per dollar spent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("loyalty_program_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loyalty_programs_restaurant_id FOREIGN KEY ("restaurant_id") REFERENCES restaurants ("restaurant_id")
)
